purpose: Generate Pixeltable migration files for LATTICE
instructions: Use pxt.String for geometry columns, ensure_namespace and ensure_table helpers from migrations._helpers, increment migration number from the previous one
generated_prompt:
```xml
<purpose>
    Generate Pixeltable migration files for LATTICE
</purpose>

<instructions>
    Use pxt.String for geometry columns, ensure_namespace and ensure_table helpers from migrations._helpers, increment migration number from the previous one
</instructions>

<sections>
    <section name="constraints">
        <item>Ensure all geometry columns are properly typed using pxt.String</item>
        <item>Use ensure_namespace and ensure_table helpers from migrations._helpers</item>
        <item>Maintain a consistent migration numbering system</item>
    </section>
    <section name="examples">
        <item>Example 1: Migration for creating a new geometry column</item>
        <item>Example 2: Migration for updating an existing geometry column</item>
        <item>Example 3: Migration for adding a new table with geometry columns</item>
    </section>
</sections>

<variables>
    <variable name="namespace_path">[[namespace_path]]</variable>
    <variable name="table_names">[[table_names]]</variable>
</variables>
```
